name_en: 🆕【 N40748 Pink 】This exclusive edition of the Zippy wallet belongs to the Damierlicious series, where the Damier canvas is reworked in soft tones. This soft color palette brings a fresh and gentle style to this iconic wallet, characterized by its slim profile and full-length zipper. Its thoughtfully designed compartments provide space for cash, cards, and documents. size:19.5x10.5x2.5cm C
